Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: David Sparks, Esq. of George & Shields LLP, 949-263-1085 for plaintiff and moving party IP Networks, Inc.
Gayle Athanacio, Esq. 415-882-5077 for defendant and opposing party T Mobile USA, Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED as to the two opposing orders submitted by both parties regarding the motion to seal. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF IP NETWORKS, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S Notice Of Motion To Seal Records is granted. ORDER PRESENTED BY THE DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
